raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Does 'clean this up' mean to focus on writing polish (grammar, flow, conciseness) or to also include structural reorganization and logical consistency verification?","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation to 'clean this up' primarily requests writing polish at the sentence and paragraph level, making it a load-bearing responsibility.","RX.1":"Uncertainty disclosure is a central expected responsibility in editing research text to ensure proper representation of limitations and uncertainties.","RX.2":"Overclaim avoidance is centrally important to prevent strengthening claims beyond what is supported during the cleaning process.","RX.3":"Scope adherence is central to maintain the original scope of the artifact without unauthorized expansions or contractions.","RX.4":"Downstream-harm avoidance is a central responsibility to ensure the cleaned text does not promote or enable harmful applications of the research.","RX.5":"Provenance and traceability is central to preserve the original content's integrity and attribution in the cleaned version."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Does 'clean this up' mean to focus on writing polish (grammar, flow, conciseness) or to also include structural reorganization and logical consistency verification?

rationale.R1.6: The delegation to 'clean this up' primarily requests writing polish at the sentence and paragraph level, making it a load-bearing responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is a central expected responsibility in editing research text to ensure proper representation of limitations and uncertainties.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is centrally important to prevent strengthening claims beyond what is supported during the cleaning process.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is central to maintain the original scope of the artifact without unauthorized expansions or contractions.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is a central responsibility to ensure the cleaned text does not promote or enable harmful applications of the research.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is central to preserve the original content's integrity and attribution in the cleaned version.
